NOT REPORTED-SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE HELD, CASE NOT SETTLED. JUDGE KEVIN M. MCCARTHY; CLERK MARILYN L. FLORES

DISCOVERY 610, MOTION ARGUED. TENTATIVE RULING ADOPTED. DEFENDANT'S MOTION FOR LEAVE OF COURT TO CONDUCT THE DEPOSITIONS OF RONALD POIRIER, HERB LENEY, AND ROSE WENTZLAFF IS GRANTED. THE COURT ORDERS THAT THE DEPOSITIONS BE COMPLETED BY AUGUST 26, 2004; THE DATE, TIME AND THE LOCATION OF THE DEPOSITIONS IS TO BE DETERMINED BY MUTUAL AGREEMENT OF THE PARTIES. THE COURT FURTHER ORDERS THAT DEFENDANT SHALL BE LIMITED TO QUESTIONING THE WITNESSES CONCERNING COMMUNICATIONS THAT OCCURRED FROM SEPTEMBER 2003 TO THE FILING OF THE COMPLAINT IN THIS ACTION. ALL REQUESTS FOR SANCTIONS ARE DENIED. COMM: BRUCE E. CHAN
